title: Self-Help Book
description:
On the floor lies a tome,
“Top 3 Ways to Conquer the Spire”

The book is [red]encrusted with blood[/red] so you find this manuscript highly suspicious.

Will you read it?

options.title: Read the Back
options.requires: You don't have any Attacks that can be [gold]Enchanted[/gold].

options.title: Read a Random Passage
options.requires: You don't have any Skills that can be [gold]Enchanted[/gold].

options.title: Read the Entire Book
options.requires: You don't have any Powers that can be [gold]Enchanted[/gold].

options.title: Move On
options.description: You don't have any cards that can be Enchanted.

notes:
All three enchantment options are shown simultaneously when at least one card type is available. Each option is independently locked if the player has no eligible cards of that type. If the player has no enchantable Attacks, Skills, or Powers at all, only the [gold]Move On[/gold] option is shown.

Each option enchants a chosen card of a specific type: [gold]Read the Back[/gold] applies [purple]Sharp 2[/purple] to an Attack, [gold]Read a Random Passage[/gold] applies [purple]Nimble 2[/purple] to a Skill, and [gold]Read the Entire Book[/gold] applies [purple]Swift 2[/purple] to a Power.
